/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/debuger.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/debuger.dir/debuger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/debuger.dir/debuger_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/debuger.dir/cmake_device_link.o  -o debuger  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-9.0/targets/x86_64-linux/lib ../../lib/parser/libparser.a image_monitor/libimage_monitor.a image_debuger/libimage_debuger.a camera_setter/libcamera_setter.a action_debuger/libaction_debuger.a action_monitor/libaction_monitor.a walk_remote/libwalk_remote.a joint_revise/libjoint_revise.a team_monitor/libteam_monitor.a tcp_client/libtcp_client.a -lglut -lGLU -lGL ../../lib/imageproc/libimageproc.a -lcudart -lopencv_imgcodecs ui/libui.a ../../lib/parser/libparser.a tcp_client/libtcp_client.a -lglut -lGLU -lGL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.5.1 -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc ../../lib/robot/librobot.a -lboost_system -lpthread -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
